entries.prompt: Product photography of Garmin Forerunner 965 GPS multisport smartwatch. AMOLED touchscreen displaying pace 5:30/km and heart rate 152 bpm in a running activity screen. Black silicone QuickFit band. Titanium bezel with Garmin branding subtle on the rim. 3/4 angle view with slight tilt. Pure white seamless backdrop, professional studio. Lighting: single softbox key light from upper-left, fill from right, soft contact shadow lower-right. Hyperrealistic, ultra-sharp focus on main subject, premium e-commerce campaign style. No text overlays, no watermarks, no logos beyond native branding on the product itself. Aspect ratio: 1:1.

fields.subject: Garmin Forerunner 965 GPS multisport smartwatch
fields.detail: AMOLED touchscreen displaying pace 5:30/km and heart rate 152 bpm in a running activity screen. Black silicone QuickFit band. Titanium bezel with Garmin branding subtle on the rim.
